nasb.text: So they possessed all the territory of the Amorites, from the Arnon as far as the Jabbok, and from the wilderness as far as the Jordan.

esv.text: And they took possession of all the territory of the Amorites from the Arnon to the Jabbok and from the wilderness to the Jordan.

cnv.text: 佔領了亞摩利人四周的境界，從亞嫩河到雅博河，從曠野直到約旦河。

ccb.text: 从亚嫩河直到雅博河，从旷野直到约旦河。
